title: Standard-Name source manifest
description: A curated, provenance-carrying set of DD v4 nameable source paths that drives focused standard-name generation (sn run --focus-file) and selects an accepted-name subset for an upstream review PR. Paths are pre-filtered to standard-name-eligible physical, geometric, and coordinate quantities.

schema_version.description: Manifest format version. Loaders reject unknown versions.

name.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this manifest.

description.description: One-paragraph synopsis of what the manifest covers and why.

provenance.description: Where the corpus came from and the policies applied when deriving it.

eligibility_policy.description: Which node categories are admitted. 'sn_source_categories' mirrors imas_codex.core.node_categories.SN_SOURCE_CATEGORIES = {quantity, geometry, coordinate}.

path_form.description: How sources[] entries are expressed. 'dd_source_id' = IDS-relative nameable node id, with signal '/data' leaves collapsed to their parent container.

sources.description: Canonical, machine-consumable source list, grouped by IDS for readability. A loader flattens sources.<ids>[] to '<ids>/<path>'. Every entry is a DD v4 IDS-relative nameable source id.

additionalProperties.description: IDS name -> list of IDS-relative source paths.

resolution.description: Auditable record of the DD-version conversion that produced sources[]. Informational; not consumed when seeding focus sources.
